inputs.label: Curing Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Average temperature during the curing period.

inputs.label: Curing Time
inputs.businessContext: Total duration of curing in hours.

inputs.label: Datum Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Temperature below which hydration ceases for the specific concrete mix.

inputs.label: Strength Coefficient A
inputs.businessContext: Intercept of the maturity-strength logarithmic relationship.

inputs.label: Strength Coefficient B
inputs.businessContext: Slope of the maturity-strength logarithmic relationship.
